milestones: The system supports multiple players logging in and collaboratively creating/modifying a quest with shared mutable state including objectives, enemies, rewards, and difficulty levels
The system provides a balance feedback mechanism that calculates and suggests difficulty adjustments based on player skills, enemy strengths, and quest objectives
The system implements a version history feature that tracks changes to quest parameters and allows reverting to any previous version
The system includes a testing/simulation mode that runs a quest scenario and produces outcome data (e.g., success probability, combat results) for refinement
The system supports multiple quest types (at minimum combat, puzzle, and exploration) and allows integration of custom content such as player-created NPCs or items
The system provides community sharing functionality where players can publish quests and other users can rate and review them
